name: What's the biggest mistake people make filing occupational claims in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: What's the biggest mistake people make filing occupational claims in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.description: Delaying reporting or filing, assuming symptoms will resolve without documentation.[6] Idaho follows similar timelines to Utah, emphasizing prompt action.[5] Key factors: 180-day notice, causation proof early. Document from day one, avoid insurer talks alone. Fixes most denials.
